## Cluster summary (compressed top-of-mind)

**Q2-2026 grand council deliberations (45 memos, ~918KB)** span four mission arcs: (1) **STRICT-preflight enforcement** — PCC2/PCC3/PCC4 reviews (`feedback_grand_council_pcc2_comment_only_contracts_20260430.md` + `_pcc3_stats_consistency_20260430.md` + `_pcc4_kill_memory_review_enforcement_20260430.md`) established the "comment-only contracts are FORBIDDEN" + "internal-consistency assertions in stats files" + "KILL/FALSIFIED memo structural requirements" CLAUDE.md non-negotiables; the IMP permanent-fix review (`_imp_permanent_fix_review_20260430.md` + sister train_distill_swap design memo) caught the stub-loop "3.5s for 200 epochs" measurement bug that would have buried Lane 17 IMP as KILLED. (2) **Shannon floor + theoretical-bound pursuit** — `_recursive_greenup_shannon_floor_20260501.md` / `_next_shannon_floor_pivot_20260507.md` / `_30k_pmf_overhead_synthesis_20260507.md` / `_three_falsifications_path_forward_20260507.md` / `_fields_medal_theoretical_floor_20260509.md` / `_fields_medal_phase2_floor_refinement_20260509.md` (60KB) / `_fields_medal_phase2_floor_REBASELINE_with_integration_discipline_20260509.md` formalized R(D) bounds + 4 PR101 empirical bounds + the integration-discipline rebaseline; the EUREKA-mode landing (`_fields_medal_eureka_mode_implement_landing_20260509.md`) + portfolio-coherence audit (`_portfolio_coherence_journal_grade_20260509.md`, 64KB) operationalized this against actual dispatch decisions.

(3) **Strategy + design-decision deliberations** — large omnibus reviews (`_5_design_decisions_review_20260511.md` 75KB / `_a_b_work_plan_review_20260511.md` 75KB / `_pose_axis_insights_review_20260511.md` 53KB / `_substrate_design_and_implementation_landed_20260512.md` / `_omnibus_design_decisions_landed_20260514.md` / `_fields_medal_omnibus_20260515.md` 50KB / `_convergence_l5_staircase_comprehensive_plan_plus_roster_expansion_20260515.md` 50KB / `_evidence_review_modal_failures_no_compromise_optimal_lowest_score_landed_20260515.md` 38KB) handled cross-cutting tradeoffs; `_predictor_calibration_no_arbitrariness_20260505.md` + `_universal_auto_resume_pattern_20260507.md` + `_a1_post_cpu_anchor_strategy_20260509.md` 23KB drove the predictor-calibration + crash-resume + A1-CPU-anchor disciplines. (4) **Roster expansion + symposium ratifications** — `_roster_expansion_l5_papers_cooperative_receiver_time_traveler_proteges_20260515.md` added 8 grand-council seats (Atick/Redlich/Rao/Ballard/Tishby/Zaslavsky/Wyner + Time-Traveler protégé); `_symposium_nscs06_falsification_redesign_multipath_landed_20260516.md` + `_t3_strategic_symposium_50_dollar_budget_landed_20260517.md` + `_symposium_wyner_ziv_contest_compliance_optimal_design_landed_20260517.md` + `_symposium_inflate_py_extreme_compression_landed_20260518.md` + `_findings_deliberation_wave_landed_20260518.md` operationalized the per-substrate symposium discipline that became Catalog #325.

**Cross-cutting outputs:** every council deliberation appended a posterior anchor via `tac.council_continual_learning.append_council_anchor` (per Catalog #300 v2 frontmatter); the canonical 4-tier protocol (T1/T2/T3/T4) + maximum-signal preservation + Mission alignment binding directive trace back to this cluster. Operators looking for the canonical state of council discipline should read CLAUDE.md "Council hierarchy: 4-tier protocol" + "Mission alignment" sections; this cluster IS the historical evidence base those sections compress.
